title: the Bio-Medical Waste Management (Amendment) Rules, 2019

(1) इन िनयम犘 को जैव-िच琈क瀄सा अपिश瀠ट 灹बंधन (संशोधन) िनयम, 2019 कहा जाएगा। (2) ये राजप灴 म犆 इनके 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृ瀄त ह犘गे। 2. 2. 2. 2. जैव-िच琈क瀄सा अपिश瀠ट 灹बंधन िनयम, 2016 (िजसे इसम犆 इसके प瀙चात् उ榉त िनयम कहा गया है) के िनयम 4 म犆, - (i) खंड (ढ) के िलए, िन瀓निलिखत खंड 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त्:- "(ढ), सभी िब瀡तरयु榉त 瀡वा瀡瀅य के瀈灶犘 के मामले म犆, 琈दन-灹ित琈दन के आधार पर जैव-िच琈क瀄सा अपिश瀠ट 灹बंधन रिज瀡टर रखे और उसे अ獸तन करे और अनुसूची-I म犆 यथा िविन琖द榁瀠ट 炈ेणी एवं रंग क琉 को琐डंग क琉 दृि玗 से सृिजत जैव िच琈क瀄सा अपिश瀠ट犘 के अनुसार मािसक अिभलेख को बेवसाइट पर 灹द琔श榁त कर犆;’’ (ii) खंड (त) के िलए, िन瀓निलिखत खंड 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त्:- -- 1 of 3 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] "(त), सभी िब瀡तरयु榉त 瀡वा瀡瀅य के瀈灶犘 के मामले म犆, (चाहे िब瀡तर犘 क琉 सं榐या 琈कतनी भी हो), जैव- िच琈क瀄सा अपिश瀠ट 灹बंधन (संशोधन) िनयम, 2018 के 灹काशन क琉 ितिथ से दो वष猀 क琉 अविध के अंदर अपनी बेवसाइट पर वा琔ष榁क 琇रपोट榁 उपल瀑ध कराएं;’’। 3. 3. 3. 3. उ榉त िनयम犘 क琉 अनुसूची-II म犆, 灙म सं. 8 के सामने, मद सं. (1) म犆, 琇ट瀉पण म犆, खंड-3 के िलए, िन瀓निलिखत खंड 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त्:- ‘’3. दस िब瀡तर犘 से कम वाले 瀡वा瀡瀅य के瀈灶犘 को 31 琈दस瀓बर, 2019 क琉 तारीख तक 灶व अपिश瀠ट पदाथ榁 के िलए आउटपुट 炐ाव मानक का अनुपालन करना होगा। 4. उ榉त िनयम犘 क琉 अनुसूची-III म犆,- (i) 灙. सं. 3 के सामने, 瀡तंभ (3) म犆, मद सं. (vi) के प瀙चात्, िन瀓निलिखत मद अंत琔ल榁िखत क琉 जाएगी, अथा榁त्:- ‘’(vii) महािनदेशक, सश瀡灴 बल िच琈क瀄सा सेवा 獧ारा 灹चािलत िच琈क瀄सा िनरी楹ण (एमआई) क楹, जहाज犘 पर रोगी क楹 या पनडु瀑बी, 瀡टेशन िच琈क瀄सा के瀈灶 तथा अि灡म 瀡थान犘 म犆 ि瀡थत 楹े灴 अ瀡पताल का िनरी楹ण और िनगरानी।‘’ (ii) 灙.सं. 4 के सामने, 瀡तंभ (3) म犆, मद सं. (viii) के िलए, िन瀓निलिखत मद अंत琔व榁瀠ट क琉 जाएगी, अथा榁त्:- ‘’(vii) महािनदेशक, सश瀡灴 बल िच琈क瀄सा सेवा 獧ारा 灹चािलत िच琈क瀄सा िनरी楹ण (एमआई) क楹犘, जहाज犘 पर रोगी क楹 या पनडु瀑बी, 瀡टेशन िच琈क瀄सा के瀈灶犘 तथा अि灡म 瀡थान犘 म犆 ि瀡थत 楹े灴 अ瀡पताल犘 को छोडकर अ瀈य 瀡वा瀡瀅य के瀈灶犘 का िनरी楹ण और िनगरानी (िनयम-9)।‘’ [फा.सं.3-1/2000-एचएसएमडी] 琇रतेश कुमार 琐संह, संयु榉त सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पण ण ण ण :::: मूल िनयम भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग-II, खंड 3, उप-खंड (i) म犆 अिधसूचना सं. सा.का.िन. 343 (अ) तारीख 28 माच榁, 2016 獧ारा 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे और प瀙चा瀄वत牸 अिधसूचना सं. सा.का.िन. 234 (अ) तारीख 16 माच榁, 2018 獧ारा संशोिधत 琈कए गए थे। MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 19th February, 2019 G.S.R. 129(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sections 6,8 and 25 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986) read with sub-rule (4) of rule 5 of the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, the Central Government, after having dispensed with the requirement of notice under clause(a) of sub-rule (3) of rule 5 of the said rule in public interest, hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Bio-Medical Waste Management Rules, 2016, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Bio-Medical Waste Management (Amendment) Rules, 2019. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 2. In the Bio-Medical Waste Management Rules, 2016 (herein after referred to as the said rules), in rule 4,- (i) For clause (n), the following clause, shall be substituted, namely:- “(n) ,in case of all bedded health care units, maintain and update on day to day basis the bio-medical waste management register and display the monthly record on its website according to the bio-medical waste generated in terms of category and colour coding as specified in Schedule I;”; (ii) For clause (p), the following clause shall be substituted, namely:- “(p) ,in case of all bedded health care facilities (any number of beds), make available the annual report on its web-site within a period of two years from the date of publication of the Bio-Medical Waste Management (Amendment) Rules, 2018;”. 3. In Schedule II to the said rules, against serial number 8, in item (1), in the Note, for clause 3, the following clause shall be substituted, namely: - “3. Health Care Facilities having less than ten beds shall have to comply with the output discharge standard for liquid waste by 31st December, 2019.” 4. In Schedule III to the said rules, - (i) Against serial number 3, in column (3), after item (vi), the following item shall be inserted, namely: - “(viii) Inspection and monitoring of Medical Inspection (MI) rooms, sick bays onboard ships or submarines, station medical centres and field hospitals in forward locations operated by the Director General, Armed Force Medical Services.”; (ii) Against serial number 4, in column (3), for item (viii), the following item shall be is substituted, namely: - “(viii) Inspection and monitoring of health care facilities other than Medical Inspection (MI) rooms, sick bays on board ships or submarines, station medical centres and field hospitals in forward locations operated by the Director General, Armed Forces Medical Services (Rule-9).”. [F. No. 3-1/2000-HSMD] RITESH KUMAR SINGH, Jt. Secy. Note : The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide number G.S.R. 343(E), dated the 28th March, 2016 and subsequently amended vide number G.S.R. 234(E), dated the 16th March, 2018. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 3 of 3 --
